scope: git log --since=24h, 61 commits, files: app/core/, scripts/, skills/, tests/, docs/

findings.title: .bak 备份文件可能被误提交
findings.description: git 历史中出现 app/core/async_bridge.py.bak 备份文件，虽后来被删除 (.coverage/.bak)，但需确认 .gitignore 已覆盖 *.bak
findings.recommendation: 在 .gitignore 中显式忽略 *.bak / *.tmp 防止再次出现
